name: Ocucor
description: A weapon that reaches for its next victim even as it kills. With each takedown, this pistol spawns an energy tendril that reaches for a nearby target.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A weapon that reaches for its next victim even as it kills. With each takedown, this pistol spawns an energy tendril that reaches for a nearby target.

components.name: Charamote Sagan Module
components.description:
A device used to reconstruct degenerated matter into Orokin bio-material.

Source: Dismantled from Charamote servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Charamote in Orb Vallis cave hotspots during any weather. Also drops from the Exploiter Orb in the Orb Vallis.

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Thermal Sludge
components.description:
A by-product from the Weeping Towers terraforming processes.

Location: Orb Vallis on Venus

components.name: Venerdo Alloy
components.description:
A compound formed from Venerol.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Ocucor Arsenal stat displaying a Multishot value of 2 with no Mods equipped.
Fixed the Ocucors energy tendril that can home-in on enemies not being affected by Multishot.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Prime: Hotfix 25.3.2 + 25.3.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed extra beam Range (Ruinous Extension) negatively affecting the secondary beam lock Range of the Ocucor.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to equip Ruinous Extension on the Ocucor.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the Fieldron crafting requirements for the Kreska, Ocucor, and Battacor from 20 to 10.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes: *Research for the Kreska, Ocucor, and Battacor can be found in the Dojo Energy Lab, or in the Market for Platinum.
